purpose: Enumerate the six third-party source PDFs SERVO v5 is bound to, so a reproducer can acquire each from its public source and verify byte-identity before running the source-fidelity tests.
redistribution_note: All six PDFs are third-party copyrighted works. This package does not include them. Obtain each from the acquisition pointer below, then confirm sha256sum matches the value recorded here (and in servo_v5_source_freeze_manifest.json, the authoritative source) before treating any source-fidelity check as verified.

cases.title: Autonomous chemical research with large language models
cases.authors: Boiko, Daniil A; MacKnight, Robert; Kline, Ben; Gomes, Gabe
cases.pdf_filename: Boiko 2023 - Autonomous Chemical Research with LLMs.pdf

cases.title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
cases.authors: Lu, Chris; Lu, Cong; Lange, Robert Tjarko; Foerster, Jakob; Clune, Jeff; Ha, David
cases.pdf_filename: The AI Scientist_ Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery.pdf

cases.title: Towards end-to-end automation of AI research
cases.authors: Lu, Chris; Lu, Cong; Lange, Robert Tjarko; Yamada, Yutaro; Hu, Shengran; Foerster, Jakob; Ha, David; Clune, Jeff
cases.pdf_filename: Towards end-to-end automation of AI research.pdf

cases.title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
cases.authors: Schmidgall, Samuel; Su, Yusheng; Wang, Ze; Sun, Ximeng; Wu, Jialian; Yu, Xiaodong; Liu, Jiang; Moor, Michael; Liu, Zicheng; Barsoum, Emad
cases.pdf_filename: Agent Laboratory - Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants.pdf

cases.title: Towards Robot Scientists for autonomous scientific discovery
cases.authors: Sparkes, Andrew; Aubrey, Wayne; Byrne, Emma; Clare, Amanda; Khan, Muhammed N; Liakata, Maria; Markham, Magdalena; Rowland, Jem; Soldatova, Larisa N; Whelan, Kenneth E; Young, Michael; King, Ross D
cases.pdf_filename: Sparkes 2010 - Towards Robot Scientists for Autonomous Scientific Discovery.pdf
cases.note: This is the only PDF SERVO C05 is frozen against (single source_pdf_sha256). The manuscript also cites king2004robot as related background on the same Robot Scientist / Adam lineage, but no second PDF is bound to C05 in the freeze manifest.

cases.title: InternAgent: When Agent Becomes the Scientist -- Building a Closed-Loop System from Hypothesis to Verification
cases.authors: InternAgent Team, Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory
cases.pdf_filename: NovelSeek - When Agent Becomes the Scientist.pdf
cases.note: Circulated as NovelSeek in earlier preprint versions; the local filename and the servo2_cases.csv system label retain that name for continuity with prior citations.
